AssociateFraudster.description: Grants permission to associate a fraudster with a watchlist

CreateDomain.description: Grants permission to create a domain

CreateWatchlist.description: Grants permission to create a watchlist

DeleteDomain.description: Grants permission to delete a domain

DeleteFraudster.description: Grants permission to delete a fraudster

DeleteSpeaker.description: Grants permission to delete a speaker

DeleteWatchlist.description: Grants permission to delete a watchlist

DescribeComplianceConsent.description: Grants permission to describe compliance consent

DescribeDomain.description: Grants permission to describe a domain

DescribeFraudster.description: Grants permission to describe a fraudster

DescribeFraudsterRegistrationJob.description: Grants permission to describe a fraudster registration job

DescribeSpeaker.description: Grants permission to describe a speaker

DescribeSpeakerEnrollmentJob.description: Grants permission to describe a speaker enrollment job

DescribeWatchlist.description: Grants permission to describe a watchlist

DisassociateFraudster.description: Grants permission to disassociate a fraudster from a watchlist

EvaluateSession.description: Grants permission to evaluate a session

ListDomains.description: Grants permission to list domains for an account

ListFraudsterRegistrationJobs.description: Grants permission to list fraudster registration jobs for a domain

ListFraudsters.description: Grants permission to list fraudsters for a domain or watchlist

ListSpeakerEnrollmentJobs.description: Grants permission to list speaker enrollment jobs for a domain

ListSpeakers.description: Grants permission to list speakers for a domain

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a Voice ID resource

ListWatchlists.description: Grants permission to list watchlists for a domain

OptOutSpeaker.description: Grants permission to opt out a speaker

RegisterComplianceConsent.description: Grants permission to register compliance consent

StartFraudsterRegistrationJob.description: Grants permission to start a fraudster registration job

StartSpeakerEnrollmentJob.description: Grants permission to start a speaker enrollment job

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a Voice ID resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag from a Voice ID resource

UpdateDomain.description: Grants permission to update a domain

UpdateWatchlist.description: Grants permission to update a watchlist

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request
